description_long: This is a robust, metallic storage box with a diamond plate steel texture covering all visible surfaces. The box features a prominent biohazard symbol on the top and three sides, with one side displaying a bold red warning label reading 'WARNING: CORONA'. Another side has a circular orange and black molecular symbol, possibly indicating hazardous or infectious contents. The box is bordered with a decorative, leaf-like metallic trim, adding a reinforced and industrial look. The overall appearance suggests it is designed for secure storage of dangerous or sensitive materials, likely in an urban or industrial environment.
description: A heavy-duty, metal storage box with diamond plate texture, biohazard symbols, and warning signage, designed for secure containment.
description_view_0: Front view shows the diamond plate surface, ornate metallic trim, and a red 'WARNING: CORONA' label.
description_view_1: This side displays only the diamond plate texture and biohazard symbol, with no additional signage.
description_view_2: Similar to view 1, this side features the diamond plate texture and biohazard symbol, without any labels or icons.
description_view_3: This side is marked by a circular orange and black molecular symbol, set against the diamond plate and bordered by the metallic trim.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: printed warning label, biohazard symbol, molecular symbol
attribute_placement_location: floor, garage, industrial area, outdoor, stackable
